calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2023 Off Calendar

Gnathonic Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge Harry Jacobs; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:18:06 a.m. and concluding at 09:21:49 a.m.

Plaintiff Gnathonic, LLC represented by George Bernard Arthur Laiolo, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Hampton Health, LTD. not appearing.

Court ordered matter continued from October 11, 2022 for the appearance of a witness to authenticate business records.

WILLIAM LASKO (Firm Accounting Manager) is placed under oath.
Declaration of William Lesko, Custodian of Records in Support of Gnathonic, LLC's Motion for Default Prove-Up Hearing filed November 16, 2022.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents offer of proof.
WILLIAM LASKO is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff's witness and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Gnathonic, LLC, and against Defendant Hampton Health, LTD., as follows:

1. Damages: $127,257.13
2. Prejudgment Interest: $26,743.37
3. Attorney Fees: Waived
4. Costs: $2,776.56

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $156,777.06

Proposed judgment to be submitted.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2022 Continued To Jan-24-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Gnathonic Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-11-2022 Continued To Dec-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge: Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:20:38 a.m. and concluding at 10:25:29 a.m.

Plaintiff Gnathonic, LLC represented by George Bernard Arthur Laiolo, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Hampton Health, Ltd. not appearing.

Plaintiff has no witnesses present and did not request to proceed by way of declaration.
Counsel for Plaintiff contends that he can testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Court determines that counsel is not the custodian of records and cannot authenticate the business records, nor confirm offer of proof.
Court orders matter continued to Dec-06-2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for hearing on motion for default prove-up hearing.
